urdu transliteration text: Jaa raha hoon, Jaa raha hoon Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: I am going, I am going to Karbala Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Maut mujhko lay chali hay Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: My death has called me to Kerbala, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Chor ker apna watan hota hoon may ab bay watan
english translation text: I am deserting my homeland, to go an unknown place

urdu transliteration text: Amma Zehra ka ujarta, dekhta hoon may chaman
english translation text: I will see my mother Zahra (AS)’s family being slaughtered (mercilessly)

urdu transliteration text: Jaa raha hoon, Jaa raha hoon Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: I am going, I am going to Karbala Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Jaata hoon bachon ko lay ker, Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: I am leaving for Kerbala with my children, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Maut mujhko lay chali hay Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: My death has called me to Kerbala, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Dil kay tukray saath hain, garmi ka mausam may safar
english translation text: My beloved family and friends are accompanying me and I am travelling in the heat of summer

urdu transliteration text: Kehti hay Zainab key bhayya, kyu dharakta hay jigar
english translation text: Zainab is asking me why her heart is not at ease

urdu transliteration text: Chotey chotey bacchon kahai kafla ay Nanajaan
english translation text: The caravan consists of many children and infants, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Jaata hoon bachon ko lay ker, Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: I am leaving for Kerbala with my children, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Maut mujhko lay chali hay Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: My death has called me to Kerbala, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Waadae tifli adaa kernay ka din ab aagaya
english translation text: It is time for me to fulfill the promise I had made in my childhood

urdu transliteration text: Apna sar khanjar taley rakhnay ka din ab aagaya
english translation text: It is time for my head to be butchered with a knife

urdu transliteration text: Sabr ka tum dijiyo mujhko dua ay Nanajaan
english translation text: Please pray that I remain patient, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Jaata hoon bachon ko lay ker, Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: I am leaving for Kerbala with my children, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Maut mujhko lay chali hay Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: My death has called me to Kerbala, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Aag say khaimay jaley, mehshar may ummat na jalay
english translation text: Let the fire burn our tents, but your followers (ummah) should not be burnt on the day of Judgment

urdu transliteration text: Pyaas say tarpu may na ummat kabhi pyasi rahay
english translation text: Let me suffer from the pangs of thirst but your followers should never stay thirsty

urdu transliteration text: Hashr may unpay aba ka kijo saya Nanajaan
english translation text: On the day of Judgment, please offer shade to your followers, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Jaata hoon bachon ko lay ker, Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: I am leaving for Kerbala with my children, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Maut mujhko lay chali hay Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: My death has called me to Kerbala, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Pyaas say tarpay meray, bachay na tarpay dill mera
english translation text: When my children cry out of thirst, may I remain strong

urdu transliteration text: Jab phattey Akbar ka sina, doo may qatil ko dua
english translation text: When Ali Akber’s (AS) chest is pierced, may I have the strength to pray for his murderer

urdu transliteration text: Imtehaan bhi sakht hoga, imtehaan ay Nanajaan
english translation text: This is going to be a very tough test for me, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Jaata hoon bachon ko lay ker, Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: I am leaving for Kerbala with my children, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Maut mujhko lay chali hay Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: My death has called me to Kerbala, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Jab churi mujh par phiray, Alhamdulillah may kahoon
english translation text: When I am being slaughtered, may I praise and thank Allah

urdu transliteration text: Teer say Asghar chide, Alhamdulillah may kahoon
english translation text: When Ali Asghar (AS) is hit by an arrow, may I praise and thank Allah

urdu transliteration text: May na rowu, jabkay rowe asmaan ay Nanajaan
english translation text: Pray that I shouldn’t cry even though the sky will weep (over my atrocities), Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Jaata hoon bachon ko lay ker, Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: I am leaving for Kerbala with my children, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Maut mujhko lay chali hay Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: My death has called me to Kerbala, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Jab tamachay khaye gi baali Sakina roengi
english translation text: When my dear Sakina (AS) will be slapped, she will cry

urdu transliteration text: Aakay laashay per meray kurta jala dikhlaengi
english translation text: She will come to my corpse and show me her burnt clothes

urdu transliteration text: Tarpay na uss waqt bhi laasha mera ay Nanajaan
english translation text: May my corpse not tremble at that time, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Jaata hoon bachon ko lay ker, Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: I am leaving for Kerbala with my children, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)

urdu transliteration text: Maut mujhko lay chali hay Kerbala ay Nanajaan
english translation text: My death has called me to Kerbala, Oh my dear Grandfather (SAW)
